title: Firework
why_this_song: Firework by Katy Perry (2010) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: As you shoot across the sky
Come on, let your colors burst
Even brighter than the moon, moon, moon
It's always been inside of you, you, you
And now it's time to let it through

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "you're" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "you're" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "boom" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "boom" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Do you ever feel like a plastic bag
Come on, let your colors burst

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Drifting through the wind, wanting to start again?
Even brighter than the moon, moon, moon

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Firework" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Firework" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Firework" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Firework" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).
